name: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Pouch - Beef &game Chunks in Jelly 100g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order)Reflex Plus Beef & Game Adult Cat Food in Pouch delivers a savory blend of beef and game proteins enriched with vitamins and minerals to promote strong muscles, healthy digestion, and overall vitality in adult cats.
description: Reflex Plus Beef & Game Chunks in Jelly Adult Cat Food in Pouch ,?fully-balanced, beef and game protein-containing cat food?carefully formulated by?cat / dog?nutritionists?to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 5.0 Crude Fiber (%) -?0.3 Moisture (%) - 83 Crude Ash (%) - 0.3 Vitamin D3 - 250 IE/kg Vitamin E - 15 mg/kg Copper -?1.0 mg/kg Biotin - 20 ?g/kg Manganese - 100 mg/kg Zinc - 15 mg/kg Taurine - 445 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: ?Meat & Animal Derivatives (beef 5% min., game 4% min.), Minerals, Inulin (0.1%). FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: One pouch per meal. An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
